description.name: OpenStack VPS & Cloud
description.tagline: Introduce automatic provisioning of flexible VPS products in WHMCS and allow your clients to conveniently manage their virtual servers remotely.
description.long:
OpenStack VPS & Cloud For WHMCS will allow you to automatically provision virtual servers and manage their crucial features straight in your WHMCS. With a variety of implemented solutions and extensive support for configurable options, the module will help you offer flexible machines that will please even the most demanding clientele.
Our product will supply your client area with essential equipment for handling VPS servers. Your customers will be able to order instances tailored finely to their needs and supervise each of them remotely, overview the server status and scheduled tasks, manage backups as well as firewall rules, and even access noVNC, VNC, RDP, SPICE or Serial console without leaving your website. Among a great many actions you will be free to perform as an administrator, enabling the rescue mode might be of particularly high value as it will permit your customers to retain access to their servers in case of any malfunction. The special importance lies also in the ability to load custom scripts to be executed automatically upon the first boot of an instance.
